restaurants.name: Il Canguro
restaurants.hours: 9:30 AM – 11:00 PM, 9:30 AM – 11:30 PM (only on Sundays)
highlights: Casual Italian spot very close to the tower with plenty of veg options

highlights: Great for a relaxed sit-down lunch with vegetarian & vegan-friendly dishes

restaurants.name: Ristoro Dantesca
restaurants.hours: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM (on Sunday, Monday, Thursday); 11:00 AM – 10:30 PM (Tuesday); 5:00– 10:00 PM (Wednesday); 11:30 AM – 10:30 PM (Friday)
highlights: Simple, local-style restaurant with a good mix of traditional Tuscan dishes

attractions.name: Leaning Tower of Pisa
attractions.description: The famous tilt is even more striking in person. The contrast of white marble against green lawns makes the entire setting feel grand and surreal
source_files: Italy/Italy- Final Itinerary with booking links.pdf

attractions.name: Piazza dei Miracoli
attractions.description: A UNESCO-listed square that houses the tower, cathedral, and baptistery — spacious, elegant, and perfect for slow exploration and photos

transport_options.description: Pay as you go recommended since hotel is close to station and most sites
Not recommended to buy a pass for less than a day visit
